name: Warhammer 40,000: Armageddon - Da Orks
developer: Flashback Games, The Lordz Games Studio
short_description: In Warhammer 40,000: Armageddon - Da Orks, a new turn-based strategy game, players will lead the Orks against the Imperial forces of the Armageddon Steel Legion and Space Marines from a variety of Chapters, under a scorching sun, through hostile ash wastes, and in the shadows of gigantic Hive Cities.
